description_long: This sconce features a sleek, metallic structure with a central cylindrical stem that attaches to the ceiling via a round mounting plate. Extending from the stem are three evenly spaced, straight arms, each ending in a circular, flat light housing. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a polished finish, giving it a contemporary and functional appearance. The light housings are likely fitted with LED bulbs, and the overall fixture is compact and unobtrusive. The metallic surfaces reflect light, enhancing its modern aesthetic. There are no visible decorative embellishments, emphasizing its utilitarian and streamlined style.
description: A modern, metallic ceiling sconce with three straight arms and circular light housings, featuring a minimalist and polished design.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three arms and light housings radiating symmetrically from the central stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical stem and the alignment of the arms, with two light housings visible and one partially obscured.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the three arms and their circular light housings, with the mounting plate visible above.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1 but from the opposite direction, showing the stem and two light housings more prominently.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist, modern design with clean lines and a polished metallic finish, emphasizing function over ornamentation.
